description: Implement the :::comparison block in Charter.Core so the Category=ComparisonBlock tests pass: classify a :::comparison container (Info=="comparison") to BlockKind.Comparison in CharterMarkdown.Describe, render a structured comparison whose block root carries the content-derived stable id and each row/option carries its OWN content-derived per-sub-element anchor, and extend SourceMap.Build to descend into the container and register each per-row sub-anchor -> its own 1-based source line (the sub-block anchor model comparison establishes and diff reuses). Serialized after 04-implement-diagram-block to avoid an overlapping-writeScope merge collision on the shared Describe/Render/SourceMap files. Do NOT edit the tests.
